FIG \u2014 Banks.lede: Prediction markets hit record volumes on World Cup betting; Macquarie bullish on Chinese AI chip stocks; routine Soitec disclosures.

bullets.text: Prediction market platforms Kalshi, Polymarket, and Rothera hit record June trading volumes; Rothera alone moved $2B on World Cup betting activity.
Macquarie initiates coverage on five Chinese AI chip makers with buy ratings, positioning itself as a lead voice on the sector.
Soitec disclosed routine voting rights and capital composition filing per French market rules; no material corporate events or M&A activity.

FIG \u2014 Asset & Wealth Management.lede: Vestmark's TAMP platform hits $50B AUM milestone on retail UMA product launch, signaling strong RIA tech demand.

bullets.text: Vestmark's AUM surges 5x past $50B after launching retail UMA with tax management capabilities; T. Rowe Price, BlackRock, Capital Group, and VanEck all sending referrals.

FIG \u2014 Insurance.lede: UK doubles down on climate risk transfer for emerging markets while AI automation reshapes underwriting economics.

bullets.text: UK Foreign Office adds £3m to Natural Disaster Fund Technical Assistance Facility, expanding blended-finance climate resilience mechanism for low- and middle-income countries.
40% of insurers now deploying AI in underwriting as competitive pressures accelerate automation—structural shift in underwriting economics and talent demand.

FIG \u2014 Specialty Finance.lede: No stories in this lane today.

PE & Deals.lede: No stories in this lane today.

Markets & Macro.lede: 4 stories span PE deal friction, tech valuation reset, market regime shift, and Fed-sensitive labor data—with a sidebar on wealth manager opacity.

bullets.text: KKR/Bridgepoint's £5.7bn DCC Energy bid faces major shareholder revolt from Ninety One, Aviva, and Fidelity—deal momentum at risk.
Tech valuations deteriorating sharply; old-fashioned valuation discipline poised to outperform as market reprices growth.
June jobs miss (217k vs May's revised 272k) signals softening labor market and lower inflation—potential Fed rate-cut catalyst for bonds.
AI-linked trades concentrating returns while market breadth narrows and bond yields reset; structural shift masked by surface equity gains.

Newsletters.lede: Three stories tracking advisor strategy shifts, valuation concerns, and emerging pharma opportunities.

bullets.text: Index fund advisors questioning passive strategies as performance drag from low-quality names outweighs market leadership gains—potential shift toward active management.
Valuation stretch marks appearing across markets as investors reassess risk premiums and quality metrics.
Psilocybin treatments for treatment-resistant depression gaining White House support, but clinical trials and regulatory pathway remain major execution risks.

Career Intel.lede: No stories in this lane today.

Learn.lede: Five stories spanning macro trends: demographic shifts boosting per-capita growth, GLP-1 drugs reshaping human behavior at scale, and AI lowering the cost of intellectual work.

bullets.text: Lower birth rates correlate with higher per-capita GDP growth, challenging conventional wisdom that demographic decline hurts economies.
GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic may have second-order effects on ambition, risk-taking, and social dynamics beyond weight loss—potential economy-wide behavioral shift.
AI tools collapse the cost of preliminary research and idea validation from weeks to hours, lowering barriers to what gets developed and explored.

all.lede: Vestmark's TAMP platform hits $50B AUM milestone on retail UMA demand; tech valuations face repricing headwinds amid narrowing market breadth.

bullets.text: Vestmark crosses $50B AUM (5x growth) after launching retail UMA with tax management; T. Rowe Price, BlackRock, Capital Group, VanEck now referring clients—signals strong RIA tech demand.
KKR/Bridgepoint's £5.7bn DCC Energy bid facing shareholder resistance from Ninety One, Aviva, Fidelity International—deal friction ahead.
Tech valuations deteriorating as market signals broader repricing; old-fashioned valuation discipline expected to outperform downside.
Equity rally masking regime shift: AI-linked trades concentrating returns while market breadth narrows and bond yields reset lower.
